captions: Malvern College Leavers Ball  Friday 8th July 2005  9pm – 1am
pages.text:
Malvern College Leavers Ball  Friday 8th July 2005  9pm – 1am

[glued-in printed card: aerial photograph of Malvern College buildings with numbered key]
[card text:]
1  Joffin's DJ & Bar
2  Jazz Trio, Bar & Chocolate Fountain  3  Cocktail Bar
4  Bouncy Castle  5  Pig Roast  6  Overnight Games Tent (from 12.30am)
You are kindly requested to keep your ticket with you during the evening.
